title: Hiring Store Manager at Evok International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Evok International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Evok International Enterprises! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Evok International Enterprises:
Evok International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
